title: randia korthalsii
intro: Randia korthalsii, also known as the wild lime or forest lime, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Randia korthalsii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and fruits of Randia korthalsii are often made into tea or decoctions, while the bark and roots are used to make infusions or tinctures.
